targeted.command: node --test test/entity-linker.test.js test/phase2-semantic-evaluation.test.js test/phase3-entity-evaluation.test.js test/semantic-task-parser.test.js test/semantic-shadow.test.js

behaviorDifference: Shadow TaskFrames now link extracted mentions to current catalog entities and reusable game concepts with provenance and candidate confidence. Legacy IntentEnvelope, deterministic execution, statistics, filtering, ranking, evidence and user-visible responses remain unchanged.
knownLimitations: The fixed phase-3 evaluation catalog is a deterministic contract set and does not replace a future independently sampled production holdout.
The current catalog has no verified unique target for the example alias 炼刀, so it remains an unresolved item mention instead of being forced to an incorrect ID.
Semantic retrieval and LLM candidate reranking are bounded optional stages; the default offline gate uses local aliases, pinyin and fuzzy retrieval only.
rollback: Revert fe84785. Entity links are shadow-only and no production data or deterministic business rule requires rollback.
